# Lifelong / Uncertainty

**Path:** `other_methods/lifelong_or_uncertainty`

Methods whose main contribution is lifelong adaptation, novelty handling, calibrated uncertainty, or memory management for place recognition.

## Scope

**Include:** lifelong memory; uncertainty-aware LPR; novel-environment detection

**Exclude:** ordinary retrieval confidence used only as a threshold

## Papers (3)
